insight: For the Mihomo runtime panel, /api/proxy and /api/status are sub-100ms; perceived switching stalls usually come from the selected egress path or URLTest delay, not the panel API itself.

Google/GitHub symptoms can come from subresource domains like googleapis.com, gstatic.com, githubcopilot.com, and cloudflare.com falling through to the bad subscription group even when google.com and github.com are already routed to PROXY.
